Thomastik Dominant Violin Strings

DOMINANT violin strings feature a flexible synthetic core for gut-like warmth and stability against humidity changes. Renowned as the “reference standard” they deliver a soft, clear sound with rich overtones, making them a legendary choice for musicians seeking exceptional tone and playability.

$8.15 – $80.20Price range: $8.15 through $80.20

Clear
SKU VS-TD Category Violin Strings
  • Description
  • Additional information
  • Reviews (0)

A standard set of strings contains the following:

E string (129) : Chrome steel

A string (131) : Synthetic core, aluminum wound

D string (132) : Synthetic core, aluminum wound

G string (133) : Synthetic core, silver wound

Sizes

String: Set, E, A, D, G

Size: 4/4, 1/2-3/4, 1/8-1/4

Features

DOMINANT violin strings have a flexible, multi-strand synthetic core, providing the warmth of gut with stable intonation.

Impervious to humidity changes, ensuring longevity and consistent performance.

The sound is soft, clear, and rich in overtones, earning them the reputation as the “reference standard.”

Recognised for legendary tone and playability, DOMINANT strings remain a top choice among musicians.

Additional information

Size

1/2, 1/4, 1/8, 3/4, 4/4
String

A, D, E, G, Set

Reviews

There are no reviews yet.

Why LVL/Our Promise/Warranty/Workshop

At LVL Music Academy, we stand firmly behind the quality of every violin and cello we offer. Each instrument is supported by warranty coverage for complete peace of mind.

Our in-house workshop handles professional repairs, fine adjustments, and detailed restoration work, ensuring your instrument remains in expert care at every stage.

As part of our long-term commitment, we also provide lifetime complimentary cleaning services for all instruments purchased from us — preserving both the beauty and performance of your instrument for years to come.
